title: CraftMine Modpack
description: A simple compiled modpack with mods that help improve the April Fools 2025 update "CraftMine!"
body:
**April fools day 2025 brought one of the best Minecraft updates Mojang has created in years!**

**CraftMine, Craft your own mine!**
# 
CraftMine brings custom mine modifiers in each mine you create, allowing you to create the perfect or challenging mine in each level. 
Collect mine ingredients, mob collectables, Throphys and xp while unlocking a new skill tree for gameplay.

This modpack adds the following...
- Jade (See what your looking at and its value for xp when you exit a mine)
- Dynamic Lignting (it gets pretty dark)
- DynamicFPS (Slight improvement for FPS, specially in the hub)
- Controlify (Disabled but for steamdeck and couch users)
- Appleskin mod (View hunger details like saturation)
- Cubic sun and moon (Resourcepack)
- JourneyMap (Create waypoints, View a map etc)
- Simple Grass Flowers (Resourcepack)
- Motschen's Better Leaves (Resourcepack)
